race.comment: ARCTIC BRIGHT (9) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the frame at the past three outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Has to be included in calculations. DUST CLOUD (5) will be ready to peak now third run back and must be respected out of the Gollan camp. In the mix. The well-related TINKLEJAZZ (13) (full to G1 winner D'Argento) is first up since a placing over 1650m here in January but should be ready to go off two nice trials, winning the latest. CANYA BERICH (7) hasn't raced since a debut placing back in September 2024 but has been readied with two decent trials. Looking for a good return.
